title: Deploy Next.js App to VPS with Docker & Nginx
description: Self-hosted production deployment route: containerize with Docker, set up Nginx as a reverse proxy with SSL, and wire up CI/CD via GitHub Actions.

steps.description: Containerize the Next.js app with a multi-stage Dockerfile
Add CI to build and push the Docker image on every push to main
Configure Nginx as a reverse proxy with SSL on the VPS
